page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7.16xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8369B processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture, running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong multi-core processing capabilities, with stress-ng multi-core CPU performance and PassMark CPU scores placing in the top 25%. The processor supports advanced instruction sets, including AVX-512 and AVX512_VNNI, which contribute to strong performance in cryptographic operations and multi-threaded decompression tasks. Memory performance is also robust, with PassMark memory benchmarks and database operations scoring in the upper tier, while single-core performance and large-block memory bandwidth remain in the average range.

From a resource density perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and high core count offer predictable compute power without hyper-threading overhead, as there is one thread per physical core. The lack of bundled local storage requires external block storage provisioning, which represents a design tradeoff for storage-heavy workloads. This instance is highly suited for compute-intensive workloads, multi-threaded data processing, database operations, and small-to-medium scale language model inference.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor at 2.7 GHz. Utilizing the x86_64 architecture, it provides 128.0 GB of system memory, resulting in a 2.0 GB per core ratio. The instance lacks local storage and integrated GPUs, but delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. Benchmark results show strong multi-core CPU performance, high cryptographic efficiency, and robust database operation capabilities, while single-core metrics align with average tiers. The dedicated core allocation without hyper-threading ensures consistent execution. This profile makes the ecs.c7.16xlarge highly suitable for compute-heavy workloads, multi-threaded decompression, database hosting, and small-to-medium scale machine learning inference tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong multi-core and database performance.

tagline: A dedicated 64-core Intel Xeon compute-optimized instance designed for high-throughput multi-threaded workloads and database operations without local storage.

128.0 GB of system memory providing a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage or GPUs
